summary: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED - Cover logic corrected. All 22 tests passed (13 unit + 9 API). Both bug cases (ORL vs MEM, SAS vs MIL) now return correct AWAY recommendations with positive edges. Frontend displays corrected picks correctly.

corrected_logic.new_correct: cover_threshold = -market_spread; HOME covers if pred_margin > cover_threshold; AWAY covers if pred_margin < cover_threshold; Edge always positive
